origin: I couldn't find leather pieces that aged beautifully and lasted for years, so I began making my own after hours in a small studio.
mission: make heirloom-quality leather goods that get better with time
audience: people who value longevity over trends
differentiators: cut, skive, and stitch each piece by hand in our studio
use full-grain leather and solid brass hardware
made-to-order to reduce waste and improve consistency
